notes: Prefer running static checks on the host; fall back to Breeze only when required by missing system dependencies.
title: Run static checks (pre-commit)

PROJECT.description: Folder containing the pyproject.toml for the package to test (e.g. airflow-core, providers/amazon).

TESTS.description: Pytest node id or path (e.g. airflow-core/tests/unit/...::test_name).

notes: Use Breeze when uv tests fail due to missing system dependencies or when reproducing CI-only failures.
title: Run targeted unit tests

notes: Returns a short string indicating the current execution context (host or breeze).
title: Detect host vs Breeze environment
